title: iria drummondii
intro: Iria drummondii, also known as Drummond's iria, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Iria drummondii include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues. Iria drummondii can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
